TRENRUAZ
Turkey's Integrated Economy Platform

THE POWERHOUSE
OF COMMERCE

Hızır Global Inc., with its integrated solutions in digital marketplace, logistics, technology, energy, and retail, is building one of Turkey's most comprehensive commerce ecosystems. We establish a fair, fast, and transparent system extending from the local producer to the end user.

Discover the Ecosystem

📍

Widespread Network Across Turkey

1500+

Partners - Sustainable Growth

Shared Profit

Model

10.000+

Active Delivery Power

"Our goal is not just to build a marketplace, but to construct a fully integrated economic system extending from producer to consumer."

Chairman of the Board

Why Hizir Global?

Not Just a Company,
We Build a System

Hızır Global offers a commerce infrastructure that unites independent brands under a single roof, is supported by technology, and based on sustainable growth. We don't just produce services — we create markets, build systems, and share profits.

Ecosystem Management

We manage all our brands under a single, integrated structure.

Digital Infrastructure

We control processes end-to-end with our own software and operational systems.

Local Development

We offer a fair model that centers around tradesmen, producers, and entrepreneurs.

Corporate Structure
Our Ecosystem

Growing Strong Together

Every brand within Hızır Global acts with a common infrastructure and vision. This structure ensures sustainable success across different sectors.

Yetiş+ Çarşı

A marketplace platform that integrates local tradesmen into the digital economy and strengthens local commerce.

Go to Site

Yetiş+ Yemek

A new generation food ecosystem that brings together restaurants, couriers, and customers in a single system.

Go to Site

Yetiş E-Depo

End-to-end logistics, stock, and distribution infrastructure for producers and sellers.

Coming Soon

Start Your Own Business, Join a Huge System

The Hızır Global ecosystem offers entrepreneurs not just a brand, but infrastructure, customers, technology, and operational support. You are not alone here. You are part of a system.

Apply Now
